welcome.line2: Your account has been created successfully.
welcome.line3: We will send important platform notifications in this chat.

authCode.subject: TyPlace — verification code
authCode.text:
Your TyPlace verification code: {{code}}

If this was not you, just ignore this email.

start.connected: TyPlace Telegram bot is connected. Return to the site: Profile → Notifications → Telegram.
start.invalidLink: The link is invalid or expired. Open TyPlace and request a new Telegram link.
start.userNotFound: TyPlace user not found. Request a new link on the site.
start.alreadyLinked: This Telegram account is already linked to another TyPlace account.
start.success: Telegram has been successfully linked to your TyPlace account. Telegram notifications are enabled.

adminLogs.officialMessage: Sent an official message to user {{userEmail}}
adminLogs.officialChatMessage: Sent a message to official chat {{chatId}}

auth.turnstileRequired: Please confirm that you are not a robot.
auth.emailAlreadyRegisteredGoLogin: This email is already registered. Go to “Login”.
auth.usernameTooShort: Enter a username with at least 3 characters.
auth.waitBeforeRetry: Please wait {{seconds}} sec. and try again.
auth.codeSentForAnotherAction: The code was sent for another action.
auth.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Request a new code.
auth.tooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
auth.tooManyVerifyRequests: Too many code verification attempts. Please try again later.
auth.usernameInvalid: Username may contain only Latin letters, numbers, _ and .
auth.usernameLettersOrDigits: Username must contain at least one letter or digit.

profile.usernameMinLength: Username must be at least 3 characters.
profile.usernameChangeTooEarly: Username can only be changed once every 30 days.

settings.telegramNotConfigured: Telegram is not configured on the server.

official.notOfficialChat: This is not an official chat.

offers.onlyClosedOfferCanBeCloned: Only a closed listing can be cloned.
offers.requiredFields: Please fill in all required fields.
offers.fillTitleForLanguage: Fill in the title for language: {{language}}.
offers.fillDescriptionForLanguage: Fill in the description for language: {{language}}.

chats.officialReadOnlyInDefaultList: In the regular list, the official chat is read-only.
chats.officialFilesNotAllowed: Files cannot be sent to the official chat yet.
chats.blockedByUser: You are blocked by this user.

orders.checkoutNotImplemented: The new checkout logic is not connected yet.
orders.onlyResolutionCanWrite: Only Resolution can write in the order chat on behalf of arbitration.
orders.noActiveDispute: There is no active dispute for this order.
orders.disputeAssignedToAnotherResolution: This dispute is assigned to another Resolution employee.
orders.onlyResolutionCanDecide: Only Resolution can make a decision on the dispute.
orders.decisionAlreadyMade: A decision has already been made for this order.
orders.cannotConfirmWhileDisputeInReview: You cannot confirm the order while the dispute is under review.
orders.cannotRefundWhileDisputeInReview: You cannot issue a refund while the dispute is under review.

reviews.onlyAfterCompletedOrder: A review can only be left after the deal is completed.

support.notOrderParticipant: You are not a participant of this order.
support.disputeAlreadyOpen: A dispute is already open for this order.
support.completedOrderAppealOnlyBuyerWithin72h: An appeal for a completed order can only be opened by the buyer within 72 hours after confirmation.
support.cannotOpenTicketForThisOrderCategory: A ticket in this category cannot be opened for this order.
support.tooManyActiveTickets: You have too many active tickets.
support.ticketIsNotOrderDispute: This ticket is not an order dispute.
support.userHasNoResolutionRole: The user does not have the Resolution role.
support.orderDisputeCannotBeTransferredManually: Order disputes cannot be transferred manually.
support.ticketAlreadyAssignedToThisEmployee: This ticket is already assigned to this employee.
support.ticketAssignedToAnotherStaff: This ticket is already assigned to another staff member.
support.onlyAdminCanTransferTickets: Only an admin can transfer tickets.
support.canCloseOnlyAssignedTicket: You can only close tickets assigned to you.
support.canCloseOnlyAfterSupportReply: You can only close the ticket after support has replied.
support.ticketAlreadyReopenedCreateNew: This ticket has already been reopened. Create a new ticket.
support.tooManyCreateRequests: Too many support requests. Please wait a bit.
support.tooManyMessageRequests: Too many messages. Please wait a bit.

admin.cannotChangeToThisRole: Not enough rights to change to this role.
admin.cannotBanThisUser: Not enough rights to ban this user.

uploads.onlyImagesAndVideos: Only images and videos can be uploaded.
uploads.onlyImagesVideosAndPdf: Only images, videos, and PDF files can be uploaded.

users.cannotBlockOfficialAccount: The official account cannot be blocked.
